termsIntro: These terms govern your use of the Food Porter platform, operated by the Rajyash Foundation, Ahmedabad. By using the website or creating an account you agree to them.
termsS1Body: Food Porter is a food-rescue coordination platform run by the Rajyash Foundation, a not-for-profit organisation based in Ahmedabad, Gujarat. It connects people with surplus food to volunteers who deliver it to people in need, and accepts monetary donations that support the foundation's work.
termsS2Body: The platform coordinates food pickups; it is not a food seller or courier company. Donors listing surplus food confirm that the food is fresh, safely handled, and fit for consumption at the time of pickup. Volunteers and drivers transport food in good faith and reasonable care. The foundation coordinates these efforts but cannot guarantee that every posted pickup will be claimed or delivered.
termsS3Body: You are responsible for your account and for the accuracy of what you post. Misuse — false listings, harassment of volunteers or donors, attempts to access other users' data, or any unlawful activity — may lead to suspension or removal of your account.
termsS4Body: Donations are voluntary contributions to the Rajyash Foundation, processed securely by Razorpay. A payment is recorded only after the payment gateway confirms it. Receipts are issued automatically with a sequential receipt number. See the Refund & Cancellation Policy for refunds. Nothing on this website is tax advice; consult your advisor about deductions.
termsS5Body: The platform is provided as-is, free of charge, as a charitable coordination tool. To the fullest extent permitted by law, the Rajyash Foundation is not liable for indirect or consequential losses arising from use of the platform, from food quality issues attributable to a donor's breach of their attestation, or from service interruptions beyond its reasonable control.
termsS6Body: We may update these terms as the service evolves; the effective date above always reflects the current version. These terms are governed by the laws of India, with courts at Ahmedabad, Gujarat having jurisdiction. Questions:
refundIntro: This policy covers monetary donations made to the Rajyash Foundation through this website.
refundS1Body: A donation is a voluntary charitable contribution, not a purchase of goods or services. Once completed, donations are generally non-refundable.
refundS2Body: If you donated an unintended amount, were charged twice, or made a donation in error, write to us within 7 days of the transaction with the payment details (amount, date, and the receipt or payment id). After verification we will refund the amount to your original payment method through Razorpay. Refunds typically reach your account within 5–7 working days of being initiated.
refundS3Body: If money left your account but the donation shows as failed or you received no receipt, the amount is normally reversed automatically by your bank within 5–7 working days. If it is not, contact us with the transaction details and we will trace it with the payment gateway.
refundS4Body: Send refund requests or payment questions to the contact below. Please include the receipt number if you have one:
